t.t-value: ', '.join(filter(None, [fp_receiver_partner.street, fp_receiver_partner.fp_district_id.name if fp_receiver_partner.fp_district_id else False, fp_receiver_partner.fp_canton_id.name if fp_receiver_partner.fp_canton_id else False, fp_receiver_partner.fp_province_id.name if fp_receiver_partner.fp_province_id else False]))
o.reversed_entry_id.fp_consecutive_number if o.fp_document_type == 'NC' and o.reversed_entry_id else (o.ref or '-')
o.invoice_currency_rate if o._fields.get('invoice_currency_rate') and o.invoice_currency_rate else 1.0
o.fp_sale_condition if o._fields.get('fp_sale_condition') and o.fp_sale_condition else (o.invoice_payment_term_id.name or '-')
o.fp_payment_method if o._fields.get('fp_payment_method') and o.fp_payment_method else '-'

fp_ship and (fp_ship.port_origin_id or fp_ship.port_destination_id or fp_ship.etd or fp_ship.eta or fp_ship.vessel_name or fp_ship.shipping_company or fp_ship.carrier_partner_id or fp_ship.container_ids or fp_ship.booking_id or fp_ship.gps_device_id)

span.t-esc: fp_document_types.get(o.fp_document_type, o.fp_document_type) if o._fields.get('fp_document_type') else o.move_type
'%.3f' % sum(l.fp_net_weight or 0.0 for l in fp_product_lines)
'%.3f' % sum(l.fp_gross_weight or 0.0 for l in fp_product_lines)
'{:.2f}'.format(sum(t.amount for t in o.line_ids.filtered(lambda l: l.tax_line_id)))

div.div: Emitida conforme la resolución de Facturación Electrónica de Costa Rica. Versión del documento 4.4.
CR Farm Products V y M Sociedad Anónima

Cédula Jurídica: · Código Exportador MAG: EMP-EX-3313
Tel: · · www.crfarmexport.com

Tax ID:
MAG Code:EMP-EX-3313
CEO:Vanessa Vega

span.t-esc: '%.3f' % sum(l.fp_net_weight or 0.0 for l in fp_product_lines)
'%.3f' % sum(l.fp_gross_weight or 0.0 for l in fp_product_lines)

div.div: Terms of Sale · Términos de Venta

Inspection & Claims Window. Buyer shall inspect the goods within 24 hours of unloading. Quality claims must be notified in writing within 48 hours, supported by an independent surveyor report (SGS, Bureau Veritas, Control Union or equivalent), photographs with metadata, datalogger reading and identification of affected boxes. Claims unsupported by such evidence shall not be processed.

Payment Terms & Late Interest. Late payments accrue interest at 1.5% per month from due date. Buyer shall not deduct, offset or withhold sums without prior written agreement of Seller. Payment of undisputed amounts may not be withheld due to claims on separate items or shipments.

Risk Transfer & Cold Chain Custody. Risk of loss or damage passes to Buyer per the INCOTERM stated above. Maintenance of refrigeration conditions and product custody after risk transfer point is Buyer's exclusive responsibility. Maximum claim value shall not exceed FOB value of affected boxes.

Title, Governing Law & Disputes. Title remains with Seller until full payment in cleared funds. Governed by the laws of Costa Rica supplemented by CISG (1980). Disputes resolved by arbitration at CICA (San José) in English. Acceptance of goods, payment, or absence of timely written objection constitutes Buyer's acceptance of these terms.
Emitida conforme la resolución de Facturación Electrónica de Costa Rica · Versión del documento 4.4
